danmakuFilter.autoCollapseHint: Automatically collapse identical comments that appear in a row.
danmakuFilter.dedupeModeSubtitle: Drop identical comments that appear multiple times within a time window.
danmakuFilter.description: Hide matching comments. They never reach the screen.
danmakuFilter.liveCountHint: Counter increases as repeats arrive. Turn off to show the total number of similar comments upfront.
danmakuFilter.maxDedupeHint: Only dedupe comments that appear less than this number of times.
danmakuFilter.minCountHint: Only trigger collapse when at least this many comments arrive. Applies for both auto-collapse and patterns.
danmakuFilter.patternModeSubtitle: Collapse multiple comments into one comment.
danmakuFilter.pulseHint: Show a pulse animation when the counter increments.
danmakuFilter.whiteListHint: Rules listed here will not be collapsed or deduped.

occlusionError.init: Failed to load the occlusion model.
occlusionError.segment: Occlusion ran but produced no result.
occlusionError.taint: Occlusion turned off: this video is protected (cross-origin or DRM) and cannot be read.
occlusionError.unavailable: Occlusion is not supported on this video.
occlusionError.webgpu: The anime occlusion model needs a WebGPU-capable browser. Switch to the People model or update your browser.

occlusionStatus.downloading: Downloading the anime occlusion model. This happens once and may take a while.

tooltip.distribution: Random: danmaku will be distributed uniformly. Order: danmaku will fill the screen from top to bottom.
tooltip.interval: Lower value means more densely packed danmaku. May cause performance issues if set too low.
tooltip.maxOnScreen: The maximum number of danmaku that can be displayed on the screen at the same time.
tooltip.occlusion: Experimental. Hides danmaku behind people in the video. May affect performance on slower devices.
tooltip.occlusionConfidence: Higher only hides danmaku over high-confidence person pixels (tighter). Lower hides more aggressively.
tooltip.occlusionEdgeSoftness: Blurs the mask edge so danmaku fade behind people instead of clipping sharply.
tooltip.occlusionQuality: Higher updates the mask more often at higher resolution, using more CPU/GPU.
tooltip.offsetScrubber: Drag horizontally or use scroll wheel to adjust, double-click to manual entry. Positive values make danmaku appear later, negative values make danmaku appear earlier.
tooltip.overlap: Higher values reduce the distance between danmaku, allowing more danmaku to be displayed on the screen at the same time, at the cost of overlapping. Set to 0 to disable overlap.
tooltip.specialDanmaku: When off, danmaku will be shown as normal scrolling danmaku
tooltip.trackHeight: Higher values makes danmaku farther apart
